author: PC Gamer
text:
Leaked Xbox Elite 3 controller images show at least one oddball addition, but it'll struggle to compete in a radically changed market
Gamepads are better, and cheaper, than they've ever been.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A PvE-only mode is coming to Marathon as Bungie lays out plans for seasons 3, 4 and 5
"We want to evolve Marathon as a whole."

author: PC Gamer
text:
The original Doom soundtrack joins 'our national playlist' in the US Library of Congress
Bobby Prince's groundbreaking soundtrack is one of 25 recordings inducted into the famed Library of Congress today.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 sells 1 million copies in its first hour, and I have to imagine the CEO of Krafton is pouring himself a very stiff drink right about now
The scenario that Krafton humiliated itself to avoid seems to be coming true very quickly.

author: PC Gamer
text:
2011 was packed with iconic games: Can you guess which ones we reviewed from a quote and the score?
Even if you weren't playing them, you probably heard about them.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Windrose hits 2 million sales milestone, proving yet again that the world really, really wanted a good pirate game
Low-hanging fruit, and someone finally plucked it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Don't sleep on Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes—it's tricky, tactical and the best FTL-like since, well, FTL
So say we all.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Subnautica 2 has sold 2 million copies in 12 hours, with 9x the players as the first, and at this point I figure that Krafton CEO is already on his second bottle
Let's sea how this all plays out.

author: PC Gamer
text:
If Subnautica 2 won't let you select 4K resolution, there's a remarkably easy fix
Let's keep things simple, yes?

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get Lucifer Rotsac in Subnautica 2
You'll need this deep-sea orange to make rubber.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to clear an Angel Comb in Subnautica 2
Blast the viral growths to get yourself the Heat Tolerance Adaptation.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Where to find all Forza Horizon 6 Treasure Cars
Track down these nine hidden gems using just a photo.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Where to find all Forza Horizon 6 Barn Finds
Dig up these 15 old cars in rundown barns.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Owner of $400,000 in bitcoin was locked out of their account a decade ago and they just used Claude to get back in
They technically could have saved money by not cashing out earlier.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Twenty years ago, copper was king for PC enthusiasts so Asus has brought it back for its ROG anniversary. Well, sort of
All that glitters is not gold. Or copper, for that matter.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to investigate the Tadpole Pens in Subnautica 2
Track down Zip's black box in the Hot Caves to get the door key code.

author: PC Gamer
text:
15% of PC Gamer readers are still rawdogging their desktops, while 43% of you are wholesome full desk pad people
Do you use a mouse mat while gaming?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Windrose hits 2 million sales milestone, proving yet again that the world really, really wanted a good pirate game
Low-hanging fruit, and someone finally plucked it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Intel's 270K Plus is worthy of being picked by Thermal Grizzly as a delidded option, and it's even cheaper than a stock 285K
One for the serious clockers only but I still kinda want one.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Going just 0.5 mm thicker would probably have saved me months of engineering': Redditor crafts actual credit card sized computer
Imagine saying 'here's my card' with this.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Star Wars: The Old Republic's original director hadn't played a single MMO before launching its development studio: 'How the hell did they trust me with this much money?'
"The next day, I created a WoW character."

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get Celestine in Subnautica 2
Grab this rare material so you craft Strontium.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Hear the Steam Controller sing whole songs with haptics, including the Wii Store soundtrack, Still Alive, and even attempt a Rick Roll
This was a triumph. I'm making a note here, 'huge success'.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Stardew Valley creator Eric Barone would never use AI, instead wants to rely on human creativity—'I feel like that should take priority over a soulless machine'
Expressing yourself should always be at the centre of all things creative.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get Creature Enamel in Subnautica 2
You'll need this material to craft Enameled Glass.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy 14 is promising big changes with Evercold, but I hope it's not a surface-level attempt
The MMO needs to break free from its predictive chains.

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get a fully functional Fabricator in Subnautica 2
It really is that simple.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Average Valve W': After some Steam Controller packages were sent to the wrong country, Valve is reportedly giving 'any standard-edition title' to affected shoppers
Apparently, a small number of packages were accidentally sent to the UK.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Alienware's new 'budget' laptop is a damning indictment of the current state of PC gaming hardware
The Alienware 15 is a new RTX 3050 gaming laptop in 2026. With resolutely single-channel memory.

author: PC Gamer
text:

You won't find this material in the ocean, as you've got to make it yourself.
